name: encampment
identity: A rough human encampment situated in a harsh arctic environment, characterized by flickering bonfires, figures draped in hides and furs, and a general atmosphere of wild wariness.
current_status: Illuminated by a flickering bonfire, with several figures milling about. The player character is being led into the site by two captors and is being pushed toward an older, commanding figure by the fire.

value: figures draped in hides and crude furs

atmosphere.value: wild, wary, musky scent of unwashed bodies and woodsmoke

volatile_state.current_activity: mill about; player character is being led into the site and pushed toward an elder figure
